targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(criado_em,'1m'), count(*) AS requests FROM audit_events WHERE $__timeFilter(criado_em) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(criado_em,'1m'), count(*) AS errors FROM audit_events WHERE codigo_erro IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(criado_em) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(criado_em,'1m'), avg(tempo_resposta_ms) AS avg_ms FROM audit_events WHERE tempo_resposta_ms IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(criado_em) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(criado_em,'1h'), 100.0 * sum( (tipo_resposta = 'FALLBACK')::int ) / NULLIF(count(*),0) AS fallback_pct FROM audit_events WHERE $__timeFilter(criado_em) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(criado_em,'1h'), count(*) FILTER (WHERE sem_documentos = TRUE) AS no_docs, count(*) AS total FROM rag_queries WHERE $__timeFilter(criado_em) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT intencao, count(*) AS cnt FROM audit_events WHERE $__timeFilter(criado_em) GROUP BY intencao ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id_evento, id_requisicao, id_sessao, codigo_erro, tipo_excecao, criado_em FROM audit_events WHERE codigo_erro IS NOT NULL ORDER BY criado_em DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(criado_em,'1h'), count(DISTINCT id_usuario) AS active_users FROM audit_events WHERE $__timeFilter(criado_em) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
